failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining')) AS rank
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Balneário & Camboriú & (restaurant | food | dining)')
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 10;
